string.text: One of our agents managed to capture important documents from the military, but he was killed before he could bring them back. They are currently hidden in the tunnels below Agroprom. I need you to covertly infiltrate the area and find them before the military does. Return them here at once when you have found them. Good luck to you.
I know of someone who could use your services. Go see him, he pays well.
Defend the Pump Station from Bandits

One of our patrols captured some bandits fucking around the pump station. After a good beating they confessed they're preparing an assault. We don't know when they'll hit, I already sent some guys over there but any help is welcome... and will be rewarded, of course.
Trying to treat our men with our dwindling supplies is a balancing act that's hard to maintain. Sooner or later, we will run out of medical supplies. Please, help me by finding a drug-making kit.

There is. I've been looking all over for a %s. It should contain some precursor chemicals that will let me synthesize common medicines. I'll pay you for one of these kits if you can bring a full set back to me.
Excellent! This will help alleviate our supply woes.
Destroy the Helicopter
Clear Area of Mutants
Assault the Bandit Camp

Rations are running low, and I need to keep the camp's bellies full. Some of the guys bring me back a kill or two every now and again. But it's been slow lately... So if you aren't too busy and you are out and about, I need %s. I process the meat, right here in my kitchen. Keep in mind that getting the mutants all riled up makes the meat tough because of the adrenaline. Also, the less bleeding, the better the meat tastes. So, be careful with your shots, okay?
Novikov needs %s to install basic equipment upgrades.
Novikov needs %s to install advanced equipment upgrades.
Novikov needs %s to install expert equipment upgrades.
Investigate the Agroprom Underground
Investigate the Agroprom Underground and search for hard evidence of a conspiracy.
Investigate Laboratory X18
Investigate Laboratory X18 and search for hard evidence of a conspiracy.
Investigate Laboratory X16
Investigate Laboratory X16 and search for hard evidence of a conspiracy.
Investigate Laboratory X19
Investigate Laboratory X19 and search for hard evidence of a conspiracy.
Investigate Laboratory X8
Investigate Laboratory X8 and search for hard evidence of a conspiracy.
Investigate the Jupiter Underground
Investigate the Jupiter Underground and search for hard evidence of a conspiracy.
